notebooks.title: Activity Coefficients
notebooks.description: Simulating how NRTL activity coefficients for the ethanol-water system evolve with temperature using PathSim blocks and connections.

notebooks.title: Cubic Equations of State
notebooks.description: Simulating the compressibility factor of methane across a pressure sweep using the Peng-Robinson and Soave-Redlich-Kwong equations of state wired into a PathSim simulation.

notebooks.title: Vapor Pressure Curves
notebooks.description: Comparing vapor pressure correlations for water by sweeping temperature through Antoine, Kirchhoff, and Wagner blocks wired into a PathSim simulation.
